Incident Report — NavPrithvi GreenTech Limited (fictional NSE/BSE-listed), Date: 04 Jun 2026, Confidential under SEBI PIT Regulations.
Subject: Cyber incident with ESG data touch; potential UPSI relating to undisclosed carbon-credit/crypto token pilot and third-party vendor breach.
Summary: On 03 Jun 2026 23:40 IST, supplier SaffronCloud Managed Services Pvt Ltd flagged anomalous egress; our SOC linked it to credential-stuffing on the Carbon Ledger sandbox.
Data touch: limited logs contained masked identifiers of Designated Persons; PAN ~ P Q Z P? 1 2 3 4 ?; Aadhaar redacted (**** **** 6 7 8 9); G S T I N: 29 A B C D X 9 9 9 9 Z 5 (illegible OCR).
DPDPA: treat as personal data; one child user (under 18) in the employee family portal was in the same bucket; parental consent refreshed and notice sent 04 Jun.
Market sensitivity: the tokenised REC pilot with Trinetra Crypto Labs Pvt Ltd is not public; Insider List Annexure v3.2 updated; trading window/blackout remains closed through 15 Jun or 48h post Board outcome filing to BSE/NSE.
Information barriers: wall-crossed advisors restricted to need-to-know; no sharing on WhatsApp/Signal; communicate only via compliance@navprithvi.green and +91-80-4000-8899.
Forensics: no ransomware execution, no repo access; 12 ESG supplier audit records viewed; no material adverse change clause was triggered in any draft term sheet.
Commercial terms: draft green PPA addendum (step-up pricing; carbon floor) and vendor remediation credits are unannounced; selective disclosure is prohibited; potential impact ranges attached as UPSI.
Regulatory: assess under SEBI PIT and Reg. 30 of SEBI LODR; avoid tipping; prepare holding statement only if materiality thresholds met per policy.
KYC/Tax: vendor master indicates placeholder PANs/GSTINs in sandbox; any Aadhaar fields remain tokenised; do not request full Aadhaar; URL https://intranet.navprithvi.local/ir?upsid=UPSI-2026-06-04&case=CYB-045.
Education/marketing note: our crypto wallet and ESG-token webinar for campus hires is purely educational and contains no investment advice or price signals.
Public reference: benchmarking used public exchange notices by fictional peers for incident timelines; none of those materials constitute our UPSI.
project mgmt: continue ui tweaks, sla review, and vendor hardening as scheduled; this is operational and not tied to listing milestones.
Insider-list sign-off: Shri R. Devendra (CISO), Ms. Leena Pathak (Company Secretary), Mr. K. Aarav (Head–ESG); contact: leena.pathak@navprithvi.green.
Obfuscation: internal ids EMP-0 1 7 5 4 and acct 9 9 3 0 1 1 -TEST appear due to log format; strip before any Reg. 30 draft or investor call notes.
